description: instructions plugin — surface instruction-surface cap breaches (file sizes + counts) at session start and Stop, pulse the config-driven meta-lint engine at session start where a project ships .agent/meta-lint.json, run project-owned .agent/guards.d tripwires on Bash commands, and downgrade writes to T3 enforcement surfaces (Claude settings, hook scripts) to an ask

hooks.command: python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/meta-lint" --fast || echo "⚠️ meta-lint DISARMED — engine failed to run; instruction-system checks did NOT run this session."
